description: Recto: agreement regarding a three-storey house. Location: al-Maḥalla al-Kubrā. Dated: Adar II 1432 Seleucid = February/March 1121 CE. The parties involved are Yeshuʿa b. Yeshuʿa the Byzantine (from Bilād al-Rūm) and 'the convert' (ha-Ger) Avraham b. Moshe. A fourth storey might be built. Signed by Hillel b. Saʿadya ha-Kohen, Avraham b. Yeshuʿa, and Nissim b. Shela. Verso: alphabetic pen trials, atbash, and jottings of names. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
